source.title: Objective analysis of the topological organization of the human cortical visual connectome suggests three visual pathways

confidence_rationale: Large-sample HCP resting-state fMRI (n=470). Data-driven triple dissociation of visual pathways with probabilistic atlas of 22 visual areas. Provides direct connectome evidence for three anatomically distinct pathways matching REE's three error channels. The lateral stream (MT→MST/FST→STS) terminates near TPJ, grounding MECH-095 placement anatomically.
